title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose today，the main contract I2405 closed 899. an increased of 0.45%throughout the day; some traders were negative to sell, Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multifrequency procurement strategy. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
